programme.title: 🌊 1.8m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.5m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.5m of onshore swell and that wind, it'll be more like a washing machine than a wave today.

programme.desc:
